longform.title: The Gender Dysphoria Bible
longform.description: A dive into the multitude of ways that gender dysphoria manifests and what it means to be transgender.

messages.SITE_DESCRIPTION: A resource for those questioning their gender, already on a gender journey, or simply wanting to learn more about what it is to be transgender.
messages.FOOTER_PATREON: This site is made possible thanks to contributions from the community. If you have found this site invaluable, please consider making a pledge on patreon or a donation via Ko-fi.
messages.FOOTER_COPYRIGHT: Site text, website code and original graphics are licensed CC BY-NC-SA.
